_comment: Fixed vision eval set for `vision-eval`. Files are relative to this manifest's directory. Regenerate with `cargo run --bin vision-fixtures -- eval/vision/fixtures`. The text/table PDFs carry real text (meaningful faithfulness ground truth); the chart/screenshot/photo PNGs are synthetic placeholders (shapes/colors) — swap in representative real uploads before the definitive fidelity call. All content is fictional.

fixtures.question: What is the total due on this invoice, and who is it billed to?
What was the South region's Q2 2026 revenue, and the full-year total?
How many bars are in this chart and which is tallest?
How many buttons does this screen show?
Describe the colors in this image.
